---
title: "Sir John Patteson"
---

## Sir John Patteson

**Dates:** (1790-1861)

### Description

judge, brother-in-law of Sir John Taylor Coleridge

### Biography

He married first (1818) his cousin Elizabeth Lee (d. 1820) and, secondly (1824), Frances Duke Coleridge (d.1842).  He was father of the Rt. Rev. John Coleridge Patteson, Frances Patteson and (by his first marriage) of Joanna Patteson.

### Letters

- Letter from [<i>c</i>.  1900]
- Letter from April 23, 1872.
- Letter from April 22nd [1872]
- Letter from March 23, 1867.
- Letter from April 24, 1866.
- Letter from [19 ?October or November 1861]
- Letter from July 7, 1861
- Letter from July 13th 1860
- Letter from Kohimarama: Dec. 21, 1859.
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
